artPrompt: A triumphant moment on the town green as a stern townswoman sweeps an absurdly lavish spread of cookies, casseroles, and wrapped treats off a folding table straight into a giant canvas tote bag, crumbs and a tumbling pastry frozen mid-air. Onlookers gasp and grin, blank placards and picket fences behind. Golden afternoon light bathes the heist of refreshments, green and ivory tones, comic civic justice composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: The Mayor's Snacks, Confiscated
text: Gain control of target artifact an opponent controls that is a Food or has "snack" in its name or text. If you can't, instead: the player with the most permanents gives you any one snack physically in front of them, and you gain 3 life and create two 1/1 green and white Voter creature tokens. (Redistribution of refreshments.)
flavorText: The rival mayor's snack budget was, frankly, obscene. The recall has audited it directly into Marge's tote bag.
